message:
refactor(ensemble): extract token estimation logic for REST API access

Reorganize token estimation to separate data computation from CLI output:

ensemble/estimate.go:
- EstimateTokenUsage returns structured TokenEstimate with detailed
  breakdown by category (sessions, beads, mail, config, etc.)
- Add per-category stats and totals for REST API consumers
- Improve accuracy with better context size calculations

cli/ensemble_estimate.go:
- PrintTokenEstimate formats EstimateTokenUsage output for terminal
- Simplified CLI logic that delegates to ensemble package
- Better table formatting with aligned columns

Test updates:
- ensemble/estimate_test.go: Test core estimation logic
- cli/ensemble_estimate_test.go: Test CLI formatting

This enables the REST API to return the same token estimates
shown by 'ntm ensemble estimate' without duplicating logic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
